title: crotalaria staneriana
intro: Crotalaria staneriana, also known as the Staner's rattle pod or Staner's crotalaria, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria staneriana include its use as a purgative and in the treatment of fever and rheumatism. The plant is also known for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and acting as an antimicrobial agent. In traditional medicine, Crotalaria staneriana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments.
